headline: Jim Cramer on AES Corporation: “It’s Incredibly Cheap, I Would Be a Buyer of It”
summary: The AES Corporation (NYSE:AES) was among Jim Cramer’s stock calls on Mad Money recently. Starting the lightning round, a caller asked for Cramer’s thoughts on the stock, and he replied: Yeah, it’s incredibly cheap. I would be a buyer of it. I think that you could do very well there. It is ridiculously cheap, frankly. […]
